# DynamicFanoutJobComponent

Generic DynamicOut op job ‚Äî discover‚Üímap‚Üícollect via Python callables. Parallel fan-out without catalog overhead.

## Dependencies
(none)

- [Schema](schema.json) ¬∑ [Example](example.yaml)

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | Dagster job name |
| `discover_callable_path` | `str` | 'module:function' that returns a list of items (each item is passed to the process callable) |
| `process_callable_path` | `str` | 'module:function' that takes one item and returns a result |

### Retry policy

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `retry_max_retries` | `int` | ‚Äî | Per-item retry max |
| `retry_delay_seconds` | `int` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `retry_backoff` | `str` | `"exponential"` | ‚Äî |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | STOPPED \| RUNNING |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | ‚Äî | Cron schedule (None = no schedule) |
| `job_tags` | `dict` | ‚Äî | Tags applied to the job |
| `discover_kwargs` | `dict` | ‚Äî | kwargs passed to the discover callable |
| `process_kwargs` | `dict` | ‚Äî | extra kwargs merged into each process call |
| `collect_callable_path` | `str` | ‚Äî | Optional 'module:function' that takes the list of results and returns the final value |
| `mapping_key_field` | `str` | ‚Äî | If items are dicts, use this field as the DynamicOutput mapping_key (stable per-item retries). None = use the index. |
| `max_concurrent_tag_value` | `str` | ‚Äî | If set, applies tag {'dagster/concurrency_key': <value>} to the process op so an instance-level concurrency limit governs fan-out parallelism. |
| `fail_on_empty` | `bool` | `false` | Fail the job if discover returns no items |
